mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate triggers a decrease in consumer spending, leading to lower GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the labor force participation rate signals a strengthening labor market, leading to higher GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services demand index signals a weakening economy, leading to lower GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.01 over any 4-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production index signals a strengthening supply side, leading to higher GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 5-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a weakening economy, leading to lower GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate triggers a decrease in consumer spending, leading to lower GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in post-shock periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods and services demand index signals a weakening economy, leading to lower GDP growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.01 over any 4-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in late-cycle periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
